title: US says downed multiple Iran drones as both insist deal closer

snapshot.title: US says downed multiple Iran drones as both insist deal closer
snapshot.description: DUBAI/WASHINGTON/TEHRAN: The United States said it downed multiple Iranian drones targeting commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz early Saturday, hours after both sides said a deal to end the Middle East war was closer than ever. The interception came after weeks of halting talks between Tehran and Washington, mediated by Pakistan, that have been marked by threats and
snapshot.author: Agencies
snapshot.pageTitle: US says downed multiple Iran drones as both insist deal closer | Arab News
